metadata.description: cc-memory — Claude Code persistent memory plugin (anti-patch + forced handoff + live plan anchor)

plugins.name: cc-memory
plugins.description: Persistent memory: reconcile-on-write + LLM-judged semantic de-dup (no more stacked OR reworded duplicates), forced PROGRESS.md handoff with per-session annotation, live PLAN.md anchor, injection observability, FTS5 search, AI-judged extraction with Haiku + Ollama fallback.
